title: Psalm XXXII: Happy the Man by Isaac Watts
content:
Happy the man to whom his God
No more imputes his sin,
But, washed in the Redeemer's blood,
Hath made his garments clean.

Happy beyond expression he

title: Psalm XIX: The Heavens Declare Thy Glory, Lord by Isaac Watts
content:
The heavens declare thy glory, Lord,
In every star thy wisdom shines;
But when our eyes behold thy word,
We read thy name in fairer lines.

title: Psalm XXXV: Now Plead My Cause, Almighty God by Isaac Watts
content:
Now plead my cause, Almighty God,
With all the sons of strife;
And fight against the men of blood,
Who fight against my life.

Draw out thy spear and

title: Psalm XLVI: God Is the Refuge by Isaac Watts
content:
God is the refuge of his saints,
When storms of sharp distress invade;
Ere we can offer our complaints,
Behold him present with his aid!
